_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: P53-null MPNSTs were innately resistant to kinase inhibition and demonstrated the most heterogeneous kinome responses
details: Innately resistant to kinase inhibition and demonstrated most heterogeneous kinome responses
